column1: # Remaining tasks for agent_event_kv_step_level campaign (post-incident resume).
# Order: swe-rebench front-loaded (validates docker bootstrap on this box +
# backfills the 3 Arm A SR tasks that fast-failed before the dataset was cached),
# then Arm B terminal-bench x6 (Arm A TB x6 already complete on disk).
